title: Generate Encounter within a Scene
preconditions: A Scene exists within a Tick
postconditions: An encounter is generated and attached to the Scene for that Tick
trigger: GM clicks 'Generate Encounter' inside a Scene view

main_scenario.action: GM triggers encounter generation within a specific Scene in the current Tick
System reads the Scene's explicit traits and any traits inherited from active World Events in that Tick
System reads the Campaign's current Party Level and Size
System deterministically queries the monster/hazard database using the Traits
System calculates the appropriate Elite/Weak templates based on Party Level
System outputs the mechanical Trace and uses the AI Narrator to provide narrative flavor, saving it to the Scene for that Tick

exceptions.condition: No monsters found matching the exact trait combination
exceptions.action: System proposes closest match or broadens search, notifying the GM

acceptance_criteria: Encounters are generated based strictly on the Scene's traits for that specific Tick.
The generation process does not use AI for math, only for flavor text.
The encounter is saved as part of the Scene's state for that Tick.
